overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through open prairie grasslands. The character encounters passing horse-drawn wagons and crosses a shallow stream while traversing the rolling rural landscape under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with winding dirt trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through tall grass prairie

entered.detail: winding dirt path cutting through tall green grass
expansive undulating prairie with green grass covering rolling terrain
oak trees scattered across the distant landscape
dense tree line marking the horizon
weathered wooden signpost beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through expansive prairie grasslands under a partly cloudy midday sky. The landscape features rolling green hills, scattered oak trees in the distance, and a wooden signpost beside the path.

events.description: covered wagon enters from right and passes the character on the trail
character approaches shallow stream crossing as wagon moves ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as a covered wagon passes by and moves ahead into the distance

notable_agents.action: covered wagon passing from right to left and continuing ahead on the trail

entered.detail: wooden covered wagon with canvas top pulled by horses
shallow stream cutting across the dirt trail ahead

segments.scene_description: A covered wagon passes by on the right and continues ahead on the trail, gradually moving into the distance. The character follows the winding path as it approaches a shallow stream crossing in the open grassland.

events.description: second horse-drawn wagon crosses the trail from left to right
character steps into the shallow water of the stream crossing

agents.ego_description: walking through the shallow stream crossing while a second wagon passes by

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon crossing the trail from left to right

entered.detail: open wooden wagon pulled by horses crossing the path

segments.scene_description: A second horse-drawn wagon crosses the path from the left, moving perpendicular to the trail. The character continues forward and steps into the shallow water of the stream crossing, with the first wagon now visible far in the distance.

events.description: character exits stream and begins walking uphill along the trail

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along the dirt trail away from the stream crossing

entered.detail: cluster of trees on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: After crossing the stream, the character continues walking uphill along the winding dirt trail through the grassy prairie. Scattered trees become visible on the right as the path ascends the rolling terrain toward the hilltop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt trail that leads from expansive prairie grasslands through a stream crossing and up toward a rolling hilltop. It begins with the character walking past a wooden signpost under a partly cloudy midday sky, surrounded by green hills and distant oak trees. As the character follows the path, a covered wagon passes on the right and recedes into the distance, leading the way toward a shallow stream. The scene then shifts as a second horse-drawn wagon crosses the trail perpendicularly, just before the character steps into the cool water of the stream crossing. Finally, the camera follows the character as they emerge from the water and ascend the winding trail, passing scattered trees on the right while climbing toward the crest of the hilly terrain.
